programmes.show_description: Pongo Pygmaeus And Spitting. Sheldon starts the first internet flame war, and Meemaw is unhappy when George spends time with her new boyfriend. S3, Ep7
The Sin Of Greed. The university tries to recruit Sheldon, through George. Georgie gets a job working for Meemaw's new boyfriend. Mary decides to rid her home of greed. S3, Ep8
Zsalynn's Story. Zsalynn weighs close to 600-lbs and has to rely on other people to take care of her 9-year-old daughter. Is this enough motivation for her to make a drastic change? S2, Ep1
Olivia's Story. Battling depression, Olivia hasn't left her basement in over two years due to her weight issues. She travels to Houston with the hope of having life-changing surgery. S2, Ep2

programmes.show_name: Say Yes to the Dress UK
programmes.show_description: Bridal Besties. After failing to find the perfect mermaid gown, Jodie is open to new silhouettes, but is her entourage? Katrina wants a backless frock, but her crew has other plans. S2, Ep14

programmes.show_name: Say Yes to the Dress UK
programmes.show_description: Bridal Breakdown. Wedding dress shopping can be an emotional rollercoaster. Kayleigh wants something princess-worthy, while Bec is in panic mode with last minute adjustments. S2, Ep15

programmes.show_name: Say Yes to the Dress UK
programmes.show_description: Bridal Embellishment. Elisha wants bling on her gown, but when is enough 'too much'? And Elizabeth wants a dress that looks fabulous and lets her to shake it on the dancefloor. S2, Ep16

programmes.show_name: Say Yes to the Dress UK
programmes.show_description: Celebrate Your Shape. New mum Bethany is keen to celebrate her new curves with a dress to impress. Meanwhile, Didi wants to celebrate her new body after weight loss. S2, Ep17
Teleshopping.
Teleshopping.
A Party Invitation, Football. Mary gets Pastor Jeff involved when Sheldon isn't invited to Billy's birthday party. George, meanwhile, has 'male-bonding time' with Dr. Sturgis. S3, Ep9
Teenager Soup. Sheldon fakes being sick to avoid a swim test at school. Meanwhile, Dr. Sturgis spies on Meemaw's new boyfriend. S3, Ep10
A Live Chicken. George and Meemaw struggle to manage the Cooper household while Mary plans Pastor Jeff's wedding. S3, Ep11
Body Glitter, Mall Safety Kit. Sheldon catches a struggling Paige shoplifting. Meanwhile, George Sr. is furious when Georgie tries to buy his way out of chores. S3, Ep12
Contracts, Rules. George and Georgie go camping with Meemaw's new boyfriend, Dale, but things get complicated when her ex-boyfriend tags along. S3, Ep13
A Slump, A Cross. Sheldon and Georgie bond over a money-making opportunity. Meanwhile, Mary is concerned when Missy misuses religion. S3, Ep14
The Occupation Recalibration. Penny makes a big step toward pursuing a full-time acting career, and Sheldon is forced to take a vacation. S7, Ep13
The Convention Conundrum. Unable to score tickets for Comic-Con, Sheldon decides to stage his own comic-book convention, while the ladies attempt to act like grown-ups. S7, Ep14
The Locomotive Manipulation. Amy talks Sheldon into a romantic Valentine's Day getaway to Napa Valley. Leonard and Penny make an emergency visit to the vet with Raj's dog. S7, Ep15
The Table Polarization. Leonard's purchase of a new dining room table doesn't sit well with Sheldon, and Bernadette isn't happy about Howard taking another trip to space. S7, Ep16
The Friendship Turbulence. Things turn rocky between Sheldon and Wolowitz, and Bernadette steps in to mediate. Penny is offered a movie role that may prove embarrassing. S7, Ep17
The Mommy Observation. Sheldon's visit to see his mummy forces him to start addressing a new reality. The gang speculate about where they might be in 20 years. S7, Ep18
The Indecision Amalgamation. Raj wrestles with dating two women at the same time, Penny is offered a part in a trashy movie, and Sheldon can't decide between two gaming systems. S7, Ep19
The Relationship Diremption. Raj and Howard double-date, and the latter is flushed with embarrassment after Raj's girlfriend reveals a secret she knows about Howard. S7, Ep20
Anything Can Happen Recurrence. Leonard reinstates Anything Can Happen Thursday, and Sheldon attempts something spontaneous. Raj requests help from Howard in prepping for a date. S7, Ep21
The Proton Transmogrification. Sheldon receives counselling from his childhood TV idol, while Penny and Leonard reach a relationship milestone and turn it into a competition. S7, Ep22
The Gorilla Dissolution. A trying day at the movie shoot makes Penny question her life choices. Caring for a bedridden Mrs. Wolowitz is a challenge for Howard and Bernadette. S7, Ep23
The Status Quo Combustion. Sheldon gets caught up in all the life-altering changes going on around him and considers a monumental move. Raj and Emily take it to the next level. S7, Ep24
The Locomotion Interruption. Amy and Leonard take a road trip, Penny has an interview at Bernadette's company, and Howard has issues with Stuart's relationship with his mum. S8, Ep1
The Junior Professor Solution. Howard signs up to take Sheldon's class, and tensions between Penny and Bernadette give Amy an opportunity to play one against the other. S8, Ep2
The First Pitch Insufficiency. NASA asks Wolowitz to throw the first pitch at an Angels baseball game. And Sheldon says that he and Amy are a better couple than Leonard and Penny. S8, Ep3
The Hook-Up Reverberation. Raj's girlfriend gives Penny the cold shoulder after he tells her about their history, and the guys consider buying into Stuart's comic-book emporium. S8, Ep4
The Focus Attenuation. Amy and Bernadette accuse Penny of becoming a party pooper. And the guys brainstorm about inventing something cool. S8, Ep5
The Expedition Approximation. Sheldon and Raj go on an expedition that turns into a test of how long before they get under each other's skin. Leonard and Penny argue about money. S8, Ep6
Misinterpretation Agitation. Penny's sales pitch leaves a doctor-client smitten and the guys help her deal with it, and Bernadette and Amy debate female scientists and sexuality. S8, Ep7
The Prom Equivalency. Amy and Bernadette organise a prom to be held atop the guys' apartment complex, but Sheldon is leery of all the prom pomp, circumstance and romancing. S8, Ep8
Guilt Boots. Georgie panics when he learns that Jim is considering selling the tire store to his rival, and Mandy's forced to confront a long-running lie. S1, Ep21
Big Decisions. Tensions rise when Georgie finds out the truth about Mandy's boss, and Georgie does all he can to buy the tire store before Jim sells it. S1, Ep22
Dara Ó Briain introduces an end of series special featuring a look back at the best bits, hilarious out-takes and some brand-new material. S1, Ep9
Best friends and comedians Roisin Conaty and Sara Pascoe are visiting locations with the most hilarious, baffling and terribly bad reviews.
Dara Ó Briain introduces topical chat and hilarious games with Rhys James, Scott Bennett, Ed Byrne, Hugh Dennis, Sara Pascoe and Katherine Ryan. S1, Ep8
A Boyfriend's Ex-Wife. Meemaw meets Dale's ex-wife, while Sheldon is forced to work on a group project with reluctant college students. S3, Ep15
A Lipoma Jackpot. Belinda's lump on her neck causes her to be immobile. Nicole won't get married until she gets her arm pit lump removed. And, Nick unwisely removed a lipoma at home. S1, Ep5
The Fault In Our Scars. Ed wants his stomach lump removed before his girlfriend gets out of prison. And, James has a large, squishy lump on his forehead. S3, Ep8

programmes.show_name: Say Yes to the Dress: Atlanta
programmes.show_description: Two Mums Are Better Than None. When Hannah brings both her mum and step mum to help her choose a dress, the competition gets fierce. Bride Kourtney suffers from her mom's absence. S2, Ep11
Tamy Lyn's Story. A tumultuous relationship with her husband caused Tamy Lyn's weight to reach over 500lbs. Isolated from the world, she needs to restart her life. S6, Ep8

programmes.show_name: Say Yes to the Dress UK
programmes.show_description: The No To The Yes Show. Jade has tried over 30 dresses, but still can't find the one, so David intervenes when she rejects one she loves. And Amy has a big list of frock no-goes! S2, Ep18

programmes.show_name: Say Yes to the Dress UK
programmes.show_description: The Asset Management Show. Katy is spoilt for choice with wedding gowns after her breast reduction. Ria wants a frock to flaunt her bum, but her entourage - and dachshund - disagree! S2, Ep19

programmes.show_name: Say Yes to the Dress Lancashire
programmes.show_description: Do You See What I See. Lucy is blind and Gok is on a mission to help her visualise herself in her perfect wedding dress. And, Harriet seeks a budget gown for her Vegas wedding. S1, Ep2
Teleshopping.
Teleshopping.
Joyce's Choices. Joyce drives Vince crazy with jealousy when she agrees to have dinner with her ex-boyfriend. S2, Ep14
Valentine Piggyback. When Mike realises he forgot to make Valentine's Day dinner reservations with Molly, he crashes Carl's elaborate holiday plans with his girlfriend. S2, Ep15
Surprise. Molly throws a surprise birthday party for Mike. Meanwhile, Samuel dates a girl he met through an online dating service. S2, Ep16

Mike Likes Lasagna. When Molly suggests that she and Mike write their own wedding vows, Mike gets worried until Carl gives him an offbeat suggestion! S2, Ep17
Peggy Goes To Branson. When Peggy goes out of town, she leaves her beloved dog, Jim, with Mike and Molly, telling them it will be good practice for having children. S2, Ep18
Molly Can't Lie. When Mike and Molly meet with the priest at Peggy's church, Molly's outspoken and forthright nature winds up costing them their wedding chapel. S2, Ep19
Pasadena. Sheldon visits CalTech for the first time. Meanwhile, Georgie is furious when Mary listens in on a phone call with his girlfriend. S3, Ep16
An Academic Crime. Sheldon accuses Dr. Sturgis of plagiarism. Georgie has an awkward run-in with Veronica while on a date with his new girlfriend, Jana. S3, Ep17
A Couple Bruised Ribs. When George Sr. accidentally lands the school librarian in the hospital, the Cooper family look after her. Meemaw gives Georgie relationship advice. S3, Ep18
The Septum Deviation. Leonard needs surgery for a deviated septum, and Sheldon feels an operation is too dangerous and that his roommate may not make it out alive. S8, Ep9
The Champagne Reflection. Sheldon bids farewell to his Fun With Flags podcast. Leonard, Howard and Raj probe a late professor's research in search of some hidden significance. S8, Ep10
The Clean Room Infiltration. Amy plans a Victorian dinner for Christmas Eve, while Raj, Leonard and Howard try to remove a pigeon that flew into the clean room at the university. S8, Ep11
The Space Probe Disintegration. Raj awaits data from a space probe in which he was involved. Later, Leonard and Sheldon go dress shopping with Penny and Amy. S8, Ep12
The Anxiety Optimization. Sheldon becomes concerned that his cushy lifestyle is impacting his professional progress, so he asks the gang to make life more difficult for him. S8, Ep13
The Troll Manifestation. An online troll rips Leonard and Sheldon's physics paper, and a girls' night out leads to Penny, Amy and Bernadette dishing about embarrassing events. S8, Ep14
Comic Book Store Regeneration. Howard gets unsettling news amidst the excitement of the comic book store reopening, and Penny doesn't practice what she preaches. S8, Ep15
The Intimacy Acceleration. An experiment designed to make people fall in love piques Penny and Leonard's interest. Meanwhile, Leonard, Amy, Raj and Emily encounter a 'zombie.' S8, Ep16
The Making Of A Mogul. Allegations of sex trafficking and abuse begin hitting Sean Combs in late 2023. Re-examining his rise to music icon reveals early signs of trouble. S1, Ep1
Empire Under Fire. Sean Comb's alleged mistreatment of women and serial arrests avoid public scrutiny until he stands trial in 2001 on felony charges after a shooting. S1, Ep2
...Surviving A Serial Killer. Surviving The Dating Game Killer. In the 1960s, Rodney Alcala assaulted Morgan Rowan. 50 years later, Morgan learns she is not the only survivor of his attacks. S1, Ep1
